title: Payee-side state machine
description: States: Notified (received PaymentAction::Request) → AddressSent (generated fresh subaddress, sent PaymentAction::Address) → Watching (waiting for on-chain confirmation) → Complete. On Watching entry: register address with wallet watcher. On confirmation: send PaymentAction::Confirmed.
close_reason: Fully implemented by nie-6sp, nie-c20, nie-c1v respectively
